title: Freeze linked fixtures to the portable CCP v0.1 JSON contract
context: The positive fixture suite needs a richer Decision Record that stays within the CCP core boundary while showing an allowed linkage field.
decision: Model the richer Decision Record as an accepted record that supersedes an earlier minimal example without introducing product-specific metadata.
alternatives_considered: Keep the richer Decision Record identical to the minimal fixture
Add implementation-specific review or orchestration fields
consequences: The fixture demonstrates the optional supersedes field
The suite stays aligned with the frozen normative schema
